items.title: A/B test: model or prompt comparison
items.description: Compare success rates or quality scores between two LLM configurations with proportion or two-sample tests; pre-specify primary metric and α to avoid cherry-picking winners across many variants.

items.title: Latency and cost regression checks
items.description: One-sample or paired t-tests detect whether post-deployment mean latency or token usage shifted from baseline SLAs after infrastructure or prompt changes.

items.title: Benchmark significance claims
items.description: When reporting leaderboard improvements, hypothesis tests (with CIs) clarify whether metric gaps exceed evaluation-set sampling noise—especially with small dev sets.

items.title: Human vs LLM-as-judge agreement studies
items.description: Paired tests on rating differences help assess whether an automated judge systematically scores higher or lower than human raters, informing Type I/II tradeoffs in automated evaluation pipelines.
